title: Marathon Petroleum (MPC)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Marathon Petroleum using recent actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed.

fcfGrowth.rationale:

Derived directly from the company's multi-year historical Free Cash Flow CAGR. We cap it structurally at 5% to prevent overestimating growth in cyclical boom years, ensuring a conservative base.
